promptBody: It takes about a minute - a gentle walk through your cozy planner.

welcome.title: Welcome to SnugWeek
welcome.body: Let me show you around in a few small steps. You can skip anytime.

week.title: Your week
week.body: A column for each day - plan what to do and when, all on one cozy spread.

add.title: Add a task
add.body: Tap here or just start typing to drop a task into the day.

card.title: Task details
card.body: Tap a task to open its details: subtasks, tags, time, reminders and attachments.

lists.title: Lists & backlog
lists.body: Your lists and ideas live here. Drag tasks from here into the days of your week.

trackers.title: Day trackers
trackers.body: Note your mood and energy each day - a small daily check-in.

habits.title: Habits
habits.body: Tick off your habits right inside each day and watch your streaks grow.

note.title: Notes
note.body: A quiet place to jot a thought for the day or the week.

month.title: Month overview
month.body: Step back and see the whole month at a glance.

stats.title: Stats & recap
stats.body: Gentle insights and recaps across your months and years.

settings.title: Themes & settings
settings.body: Pick a cozy theme, name your notebook and tune everything to your liking. Have a snug week! 🌿

hints.tags: Add tags to group related tasks together.
hints.reminders: Set a time and get a gentle reminder before it.
hints.attachments: Attach photos, voice notes, files or links here.
hints.decorations: Add stickers, washi tape and doodles to your spread.
hints.focus: Start a focus session to work in calm, timed stretches.
hints.lock: Lock your journal with a PIN or passkey on this device.
hints.sharing: Create a read-only link to share this week with someone.

guideHint: Take the tour again, or bring back the one-time feature hints.
